tests_added: test_repo_ruff_check: Runs ruff check on routes.py
test_repo_ruff_format: Runs ruff format --check on routes.py
test_repo_py_compile: Runs python -m py_compile on routes.py
p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 3 pass_to_pass tests from repo CI/CD pipeline. Skipped: ty typecheck (requires full repo setup), pytest tests (require frontend build and many dependencies). All added tests verified to pass on base commit.

validate.notes: All core validations passed: Docker build successful, NOP test returns reward=0 (buggy code correctly fails), Gold test returns reward=1 (fixed code passes all 11 tests). Rubric judge returned 0.0 because it is designed to evaluate agent diffs against gold references, not validate the gold solution itself. The gold solution correctly follows the AGENTS.md style rule 'Be consistent with the style of the surrounding code.' as verified by ruff format and ruff check passing.
